backend_system.role: Manages all CRUD, data persistence, authentication, and API endpoints for elements, reactions, and compounds.
backend_system.api_strategy: PHP serves data as JSON via REST API endpoints (e.g., /api/elements.php)

frontend_system.role: Purely visual renderer. Fetches data from PHP endpoints and converts it into 3D objects using Three.js.
frontend_system.constraint: Keep JS logic minimal, rely on PHP for business logic and data processing.

integration_flow.step_1: Frontend sends a request to PHP API.
integration_flow.step_2: PHP queries MySQL and returns structured JSON.
integration_flow.step_3: JavaScript receives JSON and triggers Three.js to render/update the 3D scene.

technical_requirements.design_aesthetic: Minimalist luxury, dark mode, high-tech interface
